bindings.quest_action: copy the hidden ledgers and gather evidence from ambush sites
bindings.quest_focus: the guard captain's double ledgers proving years of corruption
bindings.quest_stakes: every merchant ambush on the roads was enabled by the captain's betrayal
bindings.quest_threat: the captain has loyal guards and will destroy the evidence if warned
bindings.quest_origin: years of selling patrol routes to raiders for profit
bindings.quest_time_pressure: the captain may realize the originals have been seen

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, close the door. What I'm about to show you changes everything I thought I knew about {location}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: I found {quest_focus} hidden beneath the floorboards of the guard captain's office. Payments to {enemy_type} scouts, phantom supply orders: {quest_origin}. {target_npc} always trusted the captain completely. I need {quest_item} to make copies and evidence from the old ambush sites {location_hint} before {quest_threat} becomes reality.
dialogueChunks.outro: I served under this person. I believed in them. Now I have to {quest_action}, and it feels like cutting off my own hand.

playerResponses.text: Corruption this deep has to be exposed. I'll help gather the evidence.
Selling patrol routes to raiders. That's not dishonor, that's murder. I'll help.
Going after a guard captain alone is suicide. I want no part of this.

bindings.quest_action: create untainted remedies and gather evidence from the delivery route
bindings.quest_focus: the healer's scheme to dilute medicines and sell the concentrates
bindings.quest_stakes: patients are getting sicker on worthless diluted treatments
bindings.quest_threat: the healer is trusted by everyone and any accusation will be doubted
bindings.quest_origin: a trusted healer choosing profit over the lives in their care

dialogueChunks.intro: I don't know who else to tell, {player_name}. I've been turning this over in my head for days and I'm sick with it.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The settlement healer has been running {quest_focus}. {quest_stakes}, and nobody understood why until I broke into the workshop and found watered-down vials and a private sales ledger. {target_npc} noticed first when their recovery took twice as long. I need {quest_item} to {quest_action} {location_hint}.
dialogueChunks.outro: This person held our lives in their hands and chose profit. {quest_threat}, but I can't stay silent.

playerResponses.text: Diluted medicine. People could die. Where do I start?
A healer who poisons through neglect. I've heard enough. Tell me what you need.
Accusing the settlement healer is a dangerous game. Are you certain?

bindings.quest_action: reconstruct the financial records and find the hidden cache of stolen goods
bindings.quest_focus: the community fund that was embezzled over the past year
bindings.quest_stakes: emergency savings meant for repairs and medicine have been stolen
bindings.quest_threat: when confronted privately, they threatened to accuse me of the theft instead
bindings.quest_origin: a respected leader secretly draining everyone's contributions

dialogueChunks.intro: You know {target_npc}, right? Everyone does. Respected, admired, trusted by the whole settlement. I used to be one of them, {player_name}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} has been embezzling from {quest_focus} for over a year. {quest_stakes}. I discovered the discrepancy while helping with the annual count. When I confronted them, {quest_threat}. I need {quest_item} to {quest_action} from a hidden cache {location_hint}. The area is crawling with {enemy_type}.
dialogueChunks.outro: I looked up to this person my entire life. {quest_origin} is like watching the sun go dark. But the truth doesn't care about feelings.

playerResponses.text: Financial records and a hidden cache. I'll find the proof.
Threatening to frame you when caught. That's not just dishonor, that's cowardice.
A respected leader accused of theft. This could tear the settlement apart.
